name: Guacamole Salad
recipeIngredient: 2 ½ tbsp lemon or lime juice
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel and chop the avocados into a bowl.
2. Mash with garlic and lemon juice.
3. Add remaining ingredients. The mixture will be chunky.
4. To prepare individual salads, spoon the mixture onto shredded or whole lettuce leaves.
5. Top with diced tomato for garnish and serve with tortilla chips.
6. If made ahead of time, save pits and store in a covered container until serving to prevent darkening.
NOTE: This is my own recipe and the chili can be adjusted to taste. Also, I sometimes replace the tomato and green chili with salsa.
